zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Henry de Grey - Baron Grey of Codnor於1176年出生在英國英格蘭艾可瑟洛可時，他的父親Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir18歲，母親Elana de Clare23歲。他和Isolda De Bardolf至少有2個兒子。他去世於1219年9月8日在英國德比夏爾可德諾享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baron Henry de Grey - Baron Grey of Codnor于1176年出生在英国英格兰艾可瑟洛可时，他的父亲Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir18岁，母亲Elana de Clare23岁。他和Isolda De Bardolf至少有2个儿子。他去世于1219年9月8日在英国德比夏爾可德諾享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Henry de Grey - Baron Grey of Codnor was born in 1176, in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir, was 18 and his mother, Elana de Clare, was 23. He had at least 2 sons with Isolda De Bardolf. He died on 8 September 1219, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Henry de Grey - Baron Grey of Codnor est né en 1176, à Thurrock, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elana de Clare, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Isolda De Bardolf. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1219, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Henry de Grey - Baron Grey of Codnor 1176 in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir 18 und seine Mutter Elana de Clare 23. Er hatte mit Isolda De Bardolf mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 8. September 1219 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Codnor, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Henry de Grey - Baron Grey of Codnor è nato il nel 1176 nel Thurrock, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Elana de Clare, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Isolda De Bardolf. Morì il 8 settembre 1219, nel Codnor, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron Henry de Grey - Baron Grey of Codnorが1176年にイギリスイギリスエセックススウロックで生まれた時，父Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sirは18歳，母Elana de Clareは23歳であった。彼はIsolda De Bardolfとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1219年9月8日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Henry de Grey - Baron Grey of Codnor(이)가 1176년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Elana de Clare(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Isolda De Bardolf(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1219년 9월 8일 영국 더비실르 코드너에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Henry de Grey - Baron Grey of Codnor nasceu em 1176, em Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elana de Clare, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Isolda De Bardolf. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1219, em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Henry de Grey - Baron Grey of Codnor родился в 1176 г. в местности туррокк, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elana de Clare, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Isolda De Bardolf. Он умер 8 сентября 1219 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baron Henry de Grey - Baron Grey of Codnor nació en 1176, en Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Elana de Clare, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Isolda De Bardolf. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1219, en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años.
